calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Close Of Estate
Off Calendar May-10-2023 Off Calendar

ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Report, Fees, Final Distribution
Off Calendar May-03-2023 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-06-2022 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Hilary Pierce, via Zoom, for Rebeca Bertuch, Petitioner.

The court and counsel discuss the issue of the Petitioner not having identification in the form of identification such as a driver's license. Counsel offers testimony as to the court's concerns stating that Petitioner's passport and Global ID have expired. The court instructs counsel to file a copy of the Petitioner's passport and Global Entry ID with the court, forthwith, under the cover of supplemental Duties and Liabilities and to submit courtesy copies to the Examiner as soon as they have been filed.

The Petition for Letters of Administration is taken under submission.

Judge: Hon. Joseph Quinn. Clerk: Robert Woods. Deputy: Andam. Not Reported.
